task_name: add Mistral Instruct v3 chat template

details.reasoning: The implementation has the correct structure and detection logic, but fails on critical requirements: (1) Uses COMMON_CHAT_FORMAT_PEG_NATIVE instead of the required COMMON_CHAT_FORMAT_CONTENT_ONLY format, (2) Missing '</s>' in preserved_tokens for appending after assistant turns, (3) The actual wrapping of user turns with [INST]/[/INST] markers is delegated to common_chat_template_direct_apply_impl without explicit verification it's implemented, (4) System message prepending logic is not shown in the handler. Positive aspects: Correct auto-detection logic distinguishing from Ministral by checking absence of [SYSTEM_PROMPT], LOG_DBG call present, handler correctly dispatched with (tmpl, params), no modifications to existing handlers or headers.
